case_title: RUBY LIU VS. JEAN ALDEN MCMASTER

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR MAR-25-2019. THE FEB-27-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, RUBY ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 1.0 DAYS

REMOVED FROM MASTER EXPEDITED JURY CALENDAR SET FOR NOV-04-2019 - CASE SETTLED AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WITH JUDGE PRO TEM. ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 610 ON JAN-07-2020 AT 10:30 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 3.1385. (206)

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, RUBY AS TO DEFENDANT MCMASTER, JEAN ALDEN SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-27-2019 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-24-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-04-2019
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, RUBY SERVED NOV-21-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MCMASTER, JEAN ALDEN
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 62880003) FILED BY DEFENDANT MCMASTER, JEAN ALDEN
COPYING FEES (1 PAGE) ROA PAID BY PLAINTIFF LIU, RUBY
STIPULATION TO ALTERNATIVE DISPUTE RESOLUTION ADR (TRANSACTION ID # 63189827) FILED BY MCMASTER, JEAN ALDEN LIU, RUBY
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, EXPEDITED JURY TRIAL SET FOR NOV-04-2019 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON MAR-25-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, RUBY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DEMAND FOR JURY (TRANSACTION ID # 62880003) FILED BY DEFENDANT MCMASTER, JEAN ALDEN
JURY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 62880003) DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT MCMASTER, JEAN ALDEN
ARBITRATOR CHARLES ALLAN DAVIS APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION MAR-25-2019 THROUGH JUN-23-2019.
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-07-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
